ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Assembled dimensions of the product */,
  "cutter_width" TEXT /* Width of the cutter */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in pounds */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Current discount rate for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was added to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wish_list" (
  "wish_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wish list entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wish list */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the wish list */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was added to the wish list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wish_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wish_list_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wish_list_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item is part of */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comments about the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity changed in the inventory */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order linked to the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)
